name: Zone (floor area)
status: DRAFT - rectangle form; schema section 2 supports a full polygon. Placeholder size.

geometry.note: Flat floor patch (rectangle = polygon shortcut). Translucent fill + coloured outline by kind.
geometry.frame: Datum = pose {position,yaw} at centre; local X = width, Y = depth, on the floor (Z~0).
geometry.polygon: schema section 2 Zone.polygon[] - this rectangle is the simple case; full polygon support is a later extension.
geometry.colours: agv_drivable=green, keepout=red, storage=blue, staging=amber (translucent fill + outline).

meta.author: component-authoring session (parallel)
meta.remainingAssumptions: rectangle vs arbitrary polygon; default size; colour scheme.
